revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-13

A geographical area, within which all other vessels should remain clear unless authorised.

The size and shape of the area may vary depending on the risks involved.	




(VTS33/output/8 refers) 

{{languages|Exclusion Zone}}
